name: Antonio Gil Nievas
background: Mr. Gil Nievas has been a director since 2023. He is a citizen of Spain and holds a degree in industrial engineering from the Universidad Pontificia Comillas and an MBA from Harvard Business School. He has experience in global finance and investment.
